ip_intent.one_line_desc: DOE mailbox for use as an integrated OpenTitan communication channel.
ip_intent.one_paragraph_desc:
The SoC (i.e., the SoC Host CPU or other SoC Execution Engines) may request security services from OpenTitan.
This means that pre-defined control information must be passed to OpenTitan from the security service requester.
A secure inbound/outbound mailbox can be used to implement a secure channel for these request/response transactions between the SoC and OpenTitan.

interrupts.name: mbx_ready
interrupts.desc: A new object was received in the inbound mailbox.

interrupts.name: mbx_abort
interrupts.desc: An abort request was received from the requester.

interrupts.name: mbx_error
interrupts.desc: The mailbox instance generated an error.

alerts.name: fatal_fault
alerts.desc: This fatal alert is triggered when a fatal TL-UL bus integrity fault is detected.

alerts.name: recov_fault
alerts.desc: This recoverable alert is triggered when memory with invalid ECC (e.g., uninitialized memory) or at an invalid address is accessed.
